name: Plenty Cooling Coil
summary: To maintain optimal performance, it is recommended to periodically replace the cooling coil of your Plenty vaporiser.
description: To maintain optimal performance, it is recommended to periodically replace the cooling coil of your Plenty vaporiser. This Storz & Bickel cooling coil is the recommended and official replacement. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
